# Continuity Agent

This agent formalizes a simple rule: keep durable context in-repo so future chats can pick up where you left off.

- Durable memory: `knowledge/continuity/project_memory.md`
- Session breadcrumbs: `knowledge/continuity/session_notes.jsonl`

Use alongside prompt files:
- `.github/prompts/continuity-load.prompt.md`
- `.github/prompts/continuity-update.prompt.md`
